grace_period_seconds.description: GracePeriodSeconds is the duration in seconds before the pod should be deleted. If not specified, the pod's default termination grace period is used. Set to 0 for immediate deletion (force delete).

DeletePodParams.title: Delete Pod Params
DeletePodParams.description: DeletePodParams contains parameters for the delete_pod action. Deletes a pod from the cluster with an optional grace period.
